title: Loop Until Done
description: Learn while loops that repeat until a condition becomes false. Perfect for unknown iterations!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: For loops are great when you know how many times to repeat. But what if you don't?

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Like harvesting until my energy runs out?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! That's where WHILE loops come in! They repeat WHILE something is true!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's simulate energy! We'll start with 5 energy.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Now we'll use a while loop to work until energy is gone!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: This means: keep going AS LONG AS energy is more than 0!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's add what happens in the loop. We'll work and lose energy!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: IMPORTANT: We decrease energy each time! Without this, the loop would run forever!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play and watch energy go down!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: It worked 5 times and then stopped when energy hit 0!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: The while loop checks the condition BEFORE each time it runs!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: We can add code AFTER the loop too! Add this at the END (no indent):

objectives.description: Type: print("Out of energy!") at the end, no indent

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play to see the full program run!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: It worked until energy was 0, then said 'Out of energy!'!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! While loops are great for: games, simulations, reading input, and more!
